n: Book 8, Chapter 9: South Across the Plains

steps.t: The road runs west of Elthengels for a good way before turning south. At a certain point the southward road crosses the river before it reaches Faldha…
Elfmar is the acting thane of Faldham while his father Elfhelm is away. Thane Mildrith wants you to tell Elfmar of the dangers that face the Norcrofts…
